languages.text: "Лария!" {n}Пальцы Себериана тянутся к угасающему порталу, но загребают лишь пустоту. Несколько мгновений Лорд-капитан неподвижно стоит с кулаком, замершим в воздухе. Когда он разворачивается к вам, полы его тяжелого плаща взлетают в воздух, а аугментированные суставы шумно выдыхают, выпуская пар.{/n}

"Laria!" {n}Seberian's fingers reach toward the fading portal, but grasp only empty air. For several moments, the Lord Captain stands motionless, his hand frozen in the air. When he turns to you, the hem of his heavy coat billows and his augmented joints exhale noisily, releasing steam.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Лария!" {n}Пальцы Себериана тянутся к угасающему порталу, но загребают лишь пустоту. Несколько мгновений Лорд-капитан неподвижно стоит с кулаком, замершим в воздухе. Когда он разворачивается к вам, полы его тяжелого плаща взлетают в воздух, а аугментированные суставы шумно выдыхают, выпуская пар.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Laria!" {n}Seberian's fingers reach towards the fading portal, but grasp only empty air. For several moments, the Lord Captain stands motionless, his fist frozen in the air. When he turns to you, the skirts of his heavy coat billow, and his augmented joints exhale noisily, releasing steam.{/n}

"Laria!" {n}Seberian's fingers reach towards the fading portal, but grasp only empty air. For several moments, the Lord Captain stands motionless, his fist frozen in the air. When he turns to you, the skirts of his heavy coat billow, and his augmented joints exhale noisily, releasing steam.{/n}

"Laria!" {n}Seberian's fingers reach toward the fading portal, but grasp only empty air. For several moments, the Lord Captain stands motionless, his hand frozen in the air. When he turns to you, the hem of his heavy coat billows and his augmented joints exhale noisily, releasing steam.{/n}

"Laria!" {n}Seberian's fingers reach toward the fading portal, but grasp only empty air. For several moments, the Lord Captain stands motionless, his hand frozen in the air. When he turns to you, the hem of his heavy coat billows and his augmented joints exhale noisily, releasing steam.{/n}

languages.text: "Laria!" {n}Seberian streckt die Hand nach dem verblassenden Portal aus, greift aber ins Leere. Einige Augenblicke lang steht der Lord Captain mit erhobener Hand reglos vor dir. Als er sich zu dir umwendet, bauscht sich der Saum seines schweren Mantels und aus seinen augmentierten Gelenken tritt Dampf aus.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Laria!" {n}Seberian's fingers reach toward the fading portal, but grasp only empty air. For several moments, the Lord Captain stands motionless, his hand frozen in the air. When he turns to you, the hem of his heavy coat billows and his augmented joints exhale noisily, releasing steam.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Laria!" {n}Seberian streckt die Hand nach dem verblassenden Portal aus, greift aber ins Leere. Einige Augenblicke lang steht der Lord Captain mit erhobener Hand reglos vor dir. Als er sich zu dir umwendet, bauscht sich der Saum seines schweren Mantels und aus seinen augmentierten Gelenken tritt Dampf aus.{/n}

languages.text: « Laria ! » {n}Les doigts de Seberian se tendent vers le portail qui disparaît peu à peu, se renfermant sur le vide. Pendant de longs instants, le seigneur-capitaine reste immobile, sans même bouger la main. Quand il finit par se tourner vers vous, l'ourlet de sa lourde cape se soulève et ses articulations augmentées laissent échapper un bruyant jet de vapeur.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Laria!" {n}Seberian's fingers reach toward the fading portal, but grasp only empty air. For several moments, the Lord Captain stands motionless, his hand frozen in the air. When he turns to you, the hem of his heavy coat billows and his augmented joints exhale noisily, releasing steam.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Laria ! » {n}Les doigts de Seberian se tendent vers le portail qui disparaît peu à peu, se renfermant sur le vide. Pendant de longs instants, le seigneur-capitaine reste immobile, sans même bouger la main. Quand il finit par se tourner vers vous, l'ourlet de sa lourde cape se soulève et ses articulations augmentées laissent échapper un bruyant jet de vapeur.{/n}

languages.text: «¡Laria!». {n}Los dedos de Seberian se extienden hacia el portal en dispersión, pero solo tocan el aire. Durante unos instantes, el Lord Capitán permanece inmóvil, con la mano paralizada en la misma posición. Cuando se gira hacia ti, el dobladillo de su pesado abrigo se hincha y sus articulaciones aumentadas exhalan vapor de forma ruidosa.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Laria!" {n}Seberian's fingers reach toward the fading portal, but grasp only empty air. For several moments, the Lord Captain stands motionless, his hand frozen in the air. When he turns to you, the hem of his heavy coat billows and his augmented joints exhale noisily, releasing steam.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «¡Laria!». {n}Los dedos de Seberian se extienden hacia el portal en dispersión, pero solo tocan el aire. Durante unos instantes, el Lord Capitán permanece inmóvil, con la mano paralizada en la misma posición. Cuando se gira hacia ti, el dobladillo de su pesado abrigo se hincha y sus articulaciones aumentadas exhalan vapor de forma ruidosa.{/n}

languages.text: "Laria!" {n}Seberian'ın parmakları, sönmekte olan geçide doğru uzanıyor ama sadece boşluğu kavrıyor. Eli havada donakalan Lord Kaptan, birkaç saniyeliğine hareketsiz kalıyor. Sana döndüğündeyse ağır paltosunun eteği dalgalanıyor ve ogmentli eklemleri, gürültülü bir şekilde soluyarak buhar çıkarıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Laria!" {n}Seberian's fingers reach toward the fading portal, but grasp only empty air. For several moments, the Lord Captain stands motionless, his hand frozen in the air. When he turns to you, the hem of his heavy coat billows and his augmented joints exhale noisily, releasing steam.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Laria!" {n}Seberian'ın parmakları, sönmekte olan geçide doğru uzanıyor ama sadece boşluğu kavrıyor. Eli havada donakalan Lord Kaptan, birkaç saniyeliğine hareketsiz kalıyor. Sana döndüğündeyse ağır paltosunun eteği dalgalanıyor ve ogmentli eklemleri, gürültülü bir şekilde soluyarak buhar çıkarıyor.{/n}

languages.text: “菈丽雅！”{n}塞贝里安的手指伸向那扇渐渐消散的传送门，却只抓到一片空气。舰长大人一动不动地站了好一会儿，手僵在半空。等他转向你时，厚重外套的下摆高高扬起，他那些植入物关节嘶嘶作响，喷出一阵蒸汽。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Laria!" {n}Seberian's fingers reach toward the fading portal, but grasp only empty air. For several moments, the Lord Captain stands motionless, his hand frozen in the air. When he turns to you, the hem of his heavy coat billows and his augmented joints exhale noisily, releasing steam.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “菈丽雅！”{n}塞贝里安的手指伸向那扇渐渐消散的传送门，却只抓到一片空气。舰长大人一动不动地站了好一会儿，手僵在半空。等他转向你时，厚重外套的下摆高高扬起，他那些植入物关节嘶嘶作响，喷出一阵蒸汽。{/n}

languages.text: 「ラリア！」{n}シベリアンの指は消えゆく門に伸びるが、空気を掴むだけだった。数秒間、彼は動かず、空中に伸びた手を止めたままだった。そして、彼があなたを見つめた時、重厚なコートの裾が翻り、強化された関節から大きな息が漏れて、蒸気が立ち上った。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Laria!" {n}Seberian's fingers reach toward the fading portal, but grasp only empty air. For several moments, the Lord Captain stands motionless, his hand frozen in the air. When he turns to you, the hem of his heavy coat billows and his augmented joints exhale noisily, releasing steam.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「ラリア！」{n}シベリアンの指は消えゆく門に伸びるが、空気を掴むだけだった。数秒間、彼は動かず、空中に伸びた手を止めたままだった。そして、彼があなたを見つめた時、重厚なコートの裾が翻り、強化された関節から大きな息が漏れて、蒸気が立ち上った。{/n}
